response.justification: The candidate has substantial experience in software development, including C and C++ roles at National Instruments, but lacks depth in core C++ competencies critical for this role. Their expertise skews heavily toward web and scripting languages (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and newer languages like Dlang, with limited exposure to modern C++ standards, STL, multi-threading, or industrial cybersecurity practices. The resume does not highlight experience with secure coding, message brokers, or cloud platforms relevant to the job.
strengths: Proven experience with C and C++ in a professional setting (National Instruments)
Strong background in software craftsmanship, testing, and agile methodologies
Diverse technical experience across multiple languages and domains
concerns: Minimal recent or relevant C++ development experience (last C++ role in 2015)
No demonstrated experience with STL, multi-threading, or high-performance systems
Lacks exposure to industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443-4-1) or secure coding practices
